privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: Maidomdom explains how we collect, use, and protect customer data for our e-Tax Invoice SaaS and recurring subscription service.
privacy.summary: We collect only the information needed to provide the service, activate subscriptions, generate electronic tax documents, and support our customers, while applying appropriate safeguards to that data.

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
body: Maidomdom collects information you provide directly to us, such as company name, tax ID, company address, administrator name, email address, phone number, and the details required to subscribe to the platform.

When you use the e-Tax Invoice system, we may also process document data, invoice records, customer information, product details, company settings, and usage data required to deliver the service, maintain auditability, and troubleshoot technical issues.

sections.title: 2. How We Use Information
body: We use your information to create and maintain user accounts, activate subscriptions, manage payments, deliver e-Tax Invoice workflows, and respond to support or billing requests.
Some information may also be used to improve the service, detect misuse, protect platform security, and comply with legal obligations or lawful requests from relevant authorities.

sections.title: 3. Sharing With Third Parties
body: We may share limited information with service providers involved in platform operations, such as payment processors, hosting providers, identity services, and email or infrastructure partners, strictly to the extent necessary to deliver the service.
We do not sell customer personal data to third parties and will not disclose data outside the purposes described in this policy unless there is a lawful basis to do so.

sections.title: 4. Data Protection and Retention
body: We apply reasonable technical and organizational safeguards to protect data against unauthorized access, use, disclosure, loss, or alteration, including access controls and logging for important system events.
Information is retained only as long as necessary for service delivery, legal obligations, audit requirements, and reasonable dispute resolution needs.

sections.title: 5. Your Rights and Contact
body: You may contact us to request access to, correction of, or clarification about personal data related to your use of the service via support@maidomdom.com or by phone at 02-123-4567.
If this policy changes materially, we will update this page so you can review the latest version at any time.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: Terms governing subscription, usage, and billing for Maidomdom as a monthly SaaS e-Tax Invoice platform.
terms.summary: By subscribing to or using Maidomdom, you agree to these Terms of Service, including our 7-day refund policy for monthly subscription plans.

sections.title: 1. Nature of the Service
body: Maidomdom is a subscription-based software service that helps businesses manage e-Tax Invoice workflows, company settings, customer records, and related electronic document operations online.

We may improve features, security, integrations, and performance over time as part of normal service operations, provided that doing so does not unreasonably remove the core service customers subscribed to.

sections.title: 2. Signup and User Accounts
body: Users must provide accurate and complete company and administrator information during signup, including an email address capable of receiving support and billing communications.
Customers are responsible for maintaining account security, assigning appropriate user permissions, and managing usage by people inside their organization.

sections.title: 3. Billing and Recurring Charges
body: Maidomdom subscription fees are charged according to the plan selected on the Pricing page and are processed through the payment provider we use, such as Stripe, with recurring billing that may renew automatically on a monthly basis.
You authorize us and our payment provider to charge the applicable subscription fees, taxes, and related charges associated with the selected plan.

sections.title: 4. Cancellation and Access
body: Customers may cancel future renewals using the subscription management tools provided, and cancellation will take effect according to the current billing period rules enforced by the platform or payment provider.
If payment fails, usage violates these terms, or behavior threatens platform security, we may suspend access until the issue is resolved.

sections.title: 5. 7-Day Refund Policy
body: Customers may request a refund for a monthly plan within 7 days of the initial payment if the service is materially unavailable as described on the website or if a significant technical issue cannot be resolved by us within a reasonable timeframe.
After the 7-day period, subscription fees are generally non-refundable except where required by law or when we choose to make an exception at our discretion.

sections.title: 6. Support and Billing Contact
body: For questions about plans, payments, refunds, invoices, or service access, you may contact us at support@maidomdom.com or by phone at 02-123-4567.
These terms may be updated from time to time, and the latest version will always be published on our public website.

contact.title: Contact Maidomdom
contact.description: Reach our team directly for questions about plans, billing, invoices, refunds, and support for the e-Tax Invoice platform.
contact.supportDescription: Our team can help with onboarding, company setup, sign-in issues, administrator access, and technical problems related to documents or account permissions.
supportTopics: Access issues and administrator account setup
